error.403.message: You do not have permission to access this page. Contact the administrator if you think this is an error.
error.403.title: 403 - Access Forbidden
error.404.title: 404 - Page not found
error.page.title: An error occurred
error.page.message: We're sorry, but we couldn't connect to the system. Please try again or contact support.
backend.error.INVOICE_LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached the limit of the free plan. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited invoices or delete some invoices to continue.
backend.error.INVOICE_LOCKED: This invoice is locked and cannot be modified. Locked invoices are immutable for compliance purposes. To make corrections, create a credit invoice to cancel this one, then create a new corrected invoice.
backend.error.EMAIL_MISSING_BUYER_ADDRES: Please specify buyer's email address in the invoice
backend.error.GDRIVE_FOLDER_CREATE_FAILE: Failed to create "Haiku.lt" folder in Google Drive
backend.error.GDRIVE_INCOME_FOLDER_CREAT: Failed to create "Income" folder in Google Drive
backend.error.GDRIVE_YEAR_FOLDER_CREATE_: Failed to create "{year}" folder in Google Drive
backend.error.GDRIVE_FILE_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create "{filename}" file in Google Drive
backend.error.GDRIVE_FILE_DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete file from Google Drive
backend.error.GDRIVE_NO_FILE_LINK: Invoice does not have a Google Drive file
backend.error.FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED: File size cannot exceed {maxSize}KB. Your file: {actualSize}KB
backend.error.FILE_INVALID_TYPE: Invalid file type. Supported: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, JPG, PNG, GIF
backend.error.FILE_PRO_PLAN_REQUIRED: Extra files are only available for Pro plan users
backend.error.SETTING_NOT_CHANGEABLE: This setting cannot be changed via API
backend.error.CURRENCY_CHANGE_WITH_INVOI: Cannot change currency. Currency can only be changed when you have no invoices.
backend.error.INVALID_CURRENCY_CODE: Invalid currency code: {currency}. Please use a valid ISO 4217 currency code.
backend.error.NEWSLETTER_SEND_PARTIAL: Newsletter was partially sent. Some recipients may not have received it.
backend.error.NEWSLETTER_SEND_SUCCESS: Newsletter sent successfully to all recipients.
backend.error.PLAN_MANAGED_BY_STRIPE_SUB: Your plan is managed through Stripe subscription. Please use the customer portal to make changes.
backend.error.STRIPE_CHECKOUT_FAILED: Payment checkout failed. Please try again or contact support.
backend.error.STRIPE_PORTAL_FAILED: Failed to open customer portal. Please try again.
backend.error.STRIPE_PRICE_NOT_CONFIGURE: Payment configuration error. Please contact support.
backend.error.STRIPE_UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update subscription. Please try again.
backend.error.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE_I: Payment webhook verification failed. Please contact support.
backend.error.SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_EXIST: You already have an active subscription.
backend.error.SUPPORT_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send support message. Please try again or email us directly at support@haiku.lt.
